name: Private/shared federation
pattern: Local confidential work -> distilled non-sensitive pattern -> signed sharing -> peer validation
scenario: An enterprise team shares a generic failure pattern learned from internal incidents without exposing customer data.
workflow_steps: Distill non-sensitive pattern from confidential local work.
Filter user data, secrets, and task history.
Sign the reusable pattern and publish to an allowed namespace.
policy_gates: Federation shares patterns, not user data.

input_contract.description: Concrete scenario input for this pattern example.
